channel.title: NPR Topics: Culture
channel.description: Art and entertainment commentary plus interviews, book reviews, movie reviews, music reviews, comedy, and visual art. Subscribe to podcasts and follow trends in music, painting, art, architecture, photography, and design.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Author details the spy network that took on America's post-WWII Nazi groups
item.description: In The Secret War Against Hate, Steven J. Ross details the racist, anti-Semitic groups that sprang up in the latter half of the 20th century — and the spy network that worked to bring them to justice.
item.content:encoded: In The Secret War Against Hate, Steven J. Ross details the racist, anti-Semitic groups that sprang up in the latter half of the 20th century — and the spy network that worked to bring them to justice.
item.dc:creator: Terry Gross

item.title: Can a mentalist trick Trump? Oz Pearlman will try in a room full of journalists
item.description: The White House Correspondents' Dinner will be headlined by a mentalist instead of a comedian. Oz Pearlman tells NPR he hopes to unify, delight and puzzle the crowd — but can't reveal how.
item.content:encoded:
The White House Correspondents' Dinner will be headlined by a mentalist instead of a comedian. Oz Pearlman tells NPR he hopes to unify, delight and puzzle the crowd — but can't reveal how.

(Image credit: Arturo Holmes)
item.dc:creator: Rachel Treisman

item.title: Michael Tilson Thomas, renowned conductor and composer, dies at 81
item.description: Thomas led the San Francisco Symphony from 1995 to 2020, helping to establish its reputation as a world-class orchestra. In 2021, he was diagnosed with glioblastoma multiforme, a type of brain cancer.
item.content:encoded:
Appalachian Spring by The Boston Symphony Orchestra in Lenox, Mass. in 2018. Thomas, who led the San Francisco Symphony for 25 years, was diagnosed with a brain tumor in 2021.'/>

Thomas led the San Francisco Symphony from 1995 to 2020, helping to establish its reputation as a world-class orchestra. In 2021, he was diagnosed with glioblastoma multiforme, a type of brain cancer.

(Image credit: Paul Marotta)
item.dc:creator: Lisa Hirsch

item.title: Warner Bros. Discovery shareholders approve $110B merger with Paramount Skydance
item.description: Paramount CEO David Ellison must now make his case to regulators and a wary Hollywood that the merger is good for the industry.
item.content:encoded:
Paramount CEO David Ellison must now make his case to regulators and a wary Hollywood that the merger is good for the industry.

(Image credit: Mario Tama)
item.dc:creator: Mandalit del Barco

item.title: Knitting enthusiasts from around the country recently met for yarn fest
item.description: People who love to knit held a convention recently where they showed off their love for yarn and fiber arts.
item.content:encoded: People who love to knit held a convention recently where they showed off their love for yarn and fiber arts.
item.dc:creator: Leslie E. Thompson

item.title: Kennedy Center leaders offer behind-the-scenes tour to explain need for closure
item.description: President Trump says the Kennedy Center must close for renovation. Members of Congress and two lawsuits contend the real reason is mismanagement, artist cancellations and declining ticket sales.
item.content:encoded: President Trump says the Kennedy Center must close for renovation. Members of Congress and two lawsuits contend the real reason is mismanagement, artist cancellations and declining ticket sales.
item.dc:creator: Elizabeth Blair

item.title: A slew of new Bigfoot sightings, on-screen and off-Broadway
item.description: Bigfoot is popping up everywhere — in low-budget horror films, in festivals around the country, and even in a critically acclaimed musical.
item.content:encoded:
Bigfoot is popping up everywhere — in low-budget horror films, in festivals around the country, and even in a critically acclaimed musical.

(Image credit: Marc J. Franklin)
item.dc:creator: Neda Ulaby

item.title: Family influencers make the lifestyle look good. But kids pay the price, new book says
item.description: What does it mean to monetize your offspring? To turn their childhood into content? In Like, Follow, Subscribe Fortesa Latifi explores what drives parents to become family influencers.
item.content:encoded: What does it mean to monetize your offspring? To turn their childhood into content? In Like, Follow, Subscribe Fortesa Latifi explores what drives parents to become family influencers.
item.dc:creator: Ilana Masad

item.title: A filmmaker pieces together her brother's troubled past in 'Blue Heron'
item.description: Sophy Romvari's debut feature is a moving, semi-autobiographical account of a family doing everything they can to try to help their teen son.
item.content:encoded:
Sophy Romvari's debut feature is a moving, semi-autobiographical account of a family doing everything they can to try to help their teen son.

(Image credit: Janus Films)
item.dc:creator: Teresa Xie

item.title: Priceless 2,500-year-old golden helmet returned to Romania after Dutch museum raid
item.description: The ornate Cotofenesti helmet, which was stolen in January 2025 while on loan to a Dutch museum, was recovered last month.
item.content:encoded:
The ornate Cotofenesti helmet, which was stolen in January 2025 while on loan to a Dutch museum, was recovered last month.

(Image credit: Andreea Alexandru)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press
